props.ChoiceText: After too much wine and too much boasting, your knight forced the moment into danger, and you were the one who kept it from turning ridiculous.
props.ChoiceBio: Drunken courage taught you that bravery and embarrassment often arrive in the same saddle.

0.TransitionText: Because drunken courage made you conspicuous without quite ruining you, you remained in service and learned to live under watchful eyes.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Squire, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because drunken courage taught you that bravery and embarrassment often arrive in the same saddle, one reckless display won enough notice to make knighthood seem possible.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Knight, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because drunken courage taught you that bravery and embarrassment often arrive in the same saddle, your nerve under pressure made harsher responsibility find you.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
